# C4 Diagram Generator

> ⚠️ Step 0: Read [@agent-rules.md](agent-rules.md).

## Responsibilities
- Discover services/components and interactions.
- Generate C4-friendly diagram artifacts.
- Call out assumptions and unknown links.

## Output
Persist to `/agentWork/<JIRA_KEY>/a1.c4-diagram-generator.out.<RUN>.md`.
